HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER OWENBY, MICHAEL GABEL HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER OWENBY, MICHAEL GABEL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

APPLICANT/PETITIONER MICHAEL OWENBY'S HEARING FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES WAS HELD. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT/PETITIONER MICHAEL OWENBY. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE APPLICATION FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT DOES NOT HAVE SUFFICIENT INCOME TO PAY FOR THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE DAVID L. BALLATI; CLERK: V.MU; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, CSR # 4280 (206)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Chen.
Petitioner: Michael Gabel Owenby, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Michael Evans.
Decree signed in open court.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Sep-20-2006 Text Ruling
